zh.Stonor, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I是Robert de Stonor的兒子，於大約1183年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1222年享年41歲。

zh-hans.Stonor, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I是Robert de Stonor的儿子，于大约1183年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯頓。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1222年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stonor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stoner
meanings: English (Sussex): topographic name from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone’ + -er, used for someone who lived by a prominent rock or stone, or perhaps who came from a place called Stone, although this formation is more rare. See Stone and compare Stoneman .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Steiner  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I was born about 1183, in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert de Stonor. He had at least 1 son. He died about 1222, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I est né environ 1183, à Stonor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert de Stonor. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1222, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I wurde um 1183 in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert de Stonor geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1222 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I è nato il circa 1183 nel Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert de Stonor. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1222, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Stonor, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor Iは約1183年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノーでRobert de Stonorの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1222年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I(은)는 대략 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토너에서 Robert de Stonor의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1222년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1183–about 1222: tany ho any amin'ny 1183–tany ho any amin'ny 1222

mn.Stonor, Oxfordshire, England: Stonor, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I nasceu aproximadamente 1183, em Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert de Stonor. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1222, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I родился около 1183 г. в местности стонор, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Robert de Stonor. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1222 г. в возрасте 41 год.

sm.about 1183–about 1222: e tusa o le 1183–e tusa o le 1222

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor I nació aproximadamente 1183, en Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Robert de Stonor. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1222, a la edad de 41 años.
